text_block_list.text:
One day, I have Meisho Doto training in her
signature racewear to get a sense of how a real
race might feel.

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: And... f-finish! I think that was a pretty good run!
choice_data_list:
Maybe your signature racewear had something
to do with it?

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
I think so too! I feel like I can run faster with this
on. B-but it could be my imagination.

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
I'm so thankful... They went out of their way to
design something to my taste.
choice_data_list: What kind of features did you ask for?
What kind of features did you ask for?

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
Huh?! N-no-nothing in particular, really! I don't
really understand fashion, let alone
optimat—optzima...tation?

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
S-so everything about my outfit is all thanks to
the designer. It's easy to run in, and it looks
lovely, too. I left most of the decisions to them.

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: Ah... Umm... I'm sorry... Th-the truth is...

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
I did ask for one thing. But maybe someone like
me was better off staying quiet.

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: I wanted them to include a bag.

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: Well... it has to do with my childhood, but...

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
I've been a klutz since I was young. During
outings, I would trip and fall or get separated
from the group.

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
So my mother had me carry around what she
called a "little bag of help".

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
There was nothing really special inside, just
bandages, a hand towel, and contact details.

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
But she said as long as I had that bag, I'd be
okay.

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
Whenever I was scared or nervous, I'd cling on to
that little bag like a security blanket and do my
best.

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
So, it was the first thing I thought of when the
topic of my signature racewear came up.

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
I knew that getting racewear meant I'd be
entering bigger races, and that they'd probably
be scary...

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
But with a little bag of help, I'd be brave enough
to do my best.
choice_data_list: Let's clean it up and take good care of it, then.

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
But with a little bag of help, I'd be brave enough
to do my best.
choice_data_list: Let's clean it up and take good care of it, then.

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: Clean it?

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: Oh, it is a little dirty from running just now.

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: Wow... I'm amazed. My bag is so shiny!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
So it's possible to get your bag professionally
shined. I didn't know that was a thing.

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
Oh, b-but while I was there, the worker taught me
how to do it myself.

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: From now on, I'll take care of my bag after every race. After all, it's my little bag of help.

Meisho Doto clutches her newly cleaned and
polished bag, tightly cradling it as she would her
most precious treasure.

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
Um... Well, actually, I haven't prepared anything
yet...

And so, I bring a somewhat reluctant Meisho
Doto to the academy's shop.

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
What to buy... I should get some bandages and
disinfectant. Oh, if I fall over, I'll need a towel...

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
I should get a sewing kit, and another spare
towel...

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: Ah!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
A gemstone... keychain? It's so shiny and cute,
and...
choice_data_list:
I think it would work great as a good-luck
charm.

I think it would work great as a good-luck
charm.

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
Huh?! W-well, I do want it, but my budget won't
stretch that far...

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
What?! No, b-b-but, I couldn't possibly let you do
that.
choice_data_list: I want you to be safe when you're running.

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
No, I'm p-perfectly fine not having it... Someone
like me doesn't d-deserve—T-Trainer!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
Uugh... I'm so happy... Thank you so much,
Trainer. I promise to take good care of it.

Meisho Doto carefully puts the key chain away,
acting true to her words.
